chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 326 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 2912/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on MA 2913/2023 4.For hearing of main case. 09-06-2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for the applicant. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant wishes to file Crl. Direct Complaint as his prayer for registration of an FIR has been declined by learned ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kandiaro. The applicant is at complete liberty to avail any remedy which is available to him under the law. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application stands disposed of accordingly along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
